1508100001.english: Where do you think this is?

1508100002.korean: 보이는 거라고는 텅 빈 폐허에 붉은 하늘뿐인데 말이죠.
1508100002.english: All I see is a barren ruin under a red sky.

1508100003.korean: 만약 저희가 그 빛에 휩쓸려 어디론가 이동된 거고, 당신이 얘기했던 대로 정말로 제타가 철충들이 넘어온 문을 연 것이라면…
1508100003.english: If we were swept away by that light and ended up somewhere else, and, just as you said, Zeta really did open the gate that let the Ironworms through…

1508100004.korean: 여기는 원래 철충이 있던 세상이라는 게 될 텐데요?
1508100004.english: Then this would be the world where the Ironworms originally lived, right?

1508100005.korean: - 일반적으로 생각한다면 오메가가 말한 대로 이곳은 철충들의 세상이어야 한다.
1508100005.english: – Generally speaking, like Omega said, this place should be the Ironworms' world.

1508100006.korean: - 하지만 내가 보기에도 하늘이 붉다는 걸 제외하면, 이곳의 풍경은 내가 익히 알고 있는 멸망한 세상과 크게 달라 보이지 않는다.
1508100006.english: – But aside from the red sky, the scenery doesn't look much different from the ruined world I know.

1508100007.korean:
그건 그거대로 최악이군요.
원래 있던 곳으로 돌아갈 수 없을지도 모른다는 거잖아요?
1508100007.english: That's terrible in its own way. It means we might never get back to where we came from, right?

1508100008.english: I can't believe I'm alone with you in a place I don't even understand…

1508100010.korean: 이런 상황에 놓인 적이 처음은 아닌가 보죠?
1508100010.english: I guess this isn't the first time you've been in a situation like this.

1508100011.korean:
그거 한번 보고 싶군요.
당신이 우는 모습을요.
1508100011.english: I'd love to see that. You crying.

1508100013.korean: 조금 전까지 저에게 대가를 치르게 하겠다고 말하지 않았나요?
1508100013.english: Didn't you just say a moment ago that you'd make me pay?

1508100014.korean: 그리고 마마라니… 대체 오르카에서 무슨 짓을 하고 다니는 거죠?
1508100014.english: And Mama… what on earth are you doing over at Orca?

1508100015.english: Wait, wait! Are you really crying?

1508100017.english: Ugh… I get it, just stop it! I'm starting to feel weird…

1508100018.korean: 정말이지 당신이랑 같이 있으면 저까지 이상해지는 기분이에요.
1508100018.english: Honestly, being with you makes me feel weird too.

1508100019.english: Maybe I've already become weird myself…

1508100020.korean: 적어도 당신처럼 울고 싶은 정도는 아니에요.
1508100020.english: At least I'm not at the point where I want to cry like you.

1508100021.korean: 물론 저는 지금까지 운 적이 한 번도 없지만요.
1508100021.english: Of course, I've never cried before.

1508100022.english: What are you even talking about right now?

1508100023.korean: 당신이 제 우는 모습을 언제... 잠깐! 지금 봤다고 했나요?
1508100023.english: When did you say you saw me crying… Wait! Did you actually see it?

1508100024.korean: 들은 것도 아니고 우는 모습을 봤다고요?
1508100024.english: You didn't even hear it, yet you claim you saw me crying?

1508100027.korean: 감마… 다른 사람에게 보여주면 각오하라고 분명히 일러뒀는데.
1508100027.english: Gamma… I told her to brace herself if she showed it to anyone else.

1508100028.korean: 잠깐 못 본 사이에 감마까지 그쪽에 붙었나 보군요.
1508100028.english: Looks like Gamma latched onto you while you were distracted.

1508100029.korean: 설마 그 감마가 포세이돈 회장이 아닌 다른 인간 밑으로 들어가다니 믿어지지 않네요.
1508100029.english: I can't believe Gamma would go under someone other than Chairman Poseidon.

1508100030.korean: 포세이돈 회장과 당신은 정반대의 사람으로 보이는데 어째서…
1508100030.english: You and Chairman Poseidon seem like complete opposites, so why…

1508100033.korean: 제타가 말한 그 탄환으로 레모네이드의 명령권자를 강제로 바꾼 건가요?
1508100033.english: Did you use that bullet Zeta mentioned to forcibly change Lemonade’s commander?

1508100034.english: In the end, you’re just like any other human.

1508100035.korean: 비겁하고 비열하고 겁쟁이에 더럽고 추악한 인간들과 똑같아.
1508100035.english: You’re no different from those cowardly, despicable, filthy, ugly humans.

1508100036.english: Do you really want to go that far just to control the Bio‑Roid?

1508100037.english: You too… were just a human in the end.

1508100039.english: Are you planning to use that bullet on me as well?

1508100040.korean: - 나는 순간적으로 오메가에게 달려들어 감싸 안으며 넘어졌다.
1508100040.english: - I suddenly lunged at Omega, wrapped my arms around her, and tumbled down.

1508100041.english: Ugh… what on earth are you doing…!

1508100042.korean: - 다음 순간 오메가가 서 있던 자리 뒤의 벽이 박살 났다.
1508100042.english: - In the next instant, the wall behind where Omega had been standing shattered.

1508100044.english: Goblins… and there are quite a few of them.

1508100045.english: What should we do? Run away?
